NOTES ON FORM 8.3

1.             See the definition of "connected fund manager" in Rule 2.2 of Part A of the Rules.

2.             See the definition of "interest in a relevant security" in Rule 2.5 of Part A of the Rules and see Rule 8.6(a) and (b) of Part B of the Rules.

3.             See the definition of "relevant securities" in Rule 2.1 of Part A of the Rules.

4.             See the definition of "dealing" in Rule 2.1 of Part A of the Rules.

5.             If the economic exposure to changes in the price of securities is limited, for example, by virtue of a stop loss arrangement relating to a spread bet, full details must be given.

6.             See Rule 2.5(d) of Part A of the Rules.

7.             If details included in a disclosure under Rule 8 are incorrect, they should be corrected as soon as practicable in a subsequent disclosure. Such disclosure should state clearly that it corrects details disclosed previously, identify the disclosure or disclosures being corrected, and provide sufficient detail for the reader to understand the nature of the corrections. In the case of any doubt, the Panel should be consulted.

For full details of disclosure requirements, see Rule 8 of the Rules. If in doubt, consult the Panel.

References in these notes to "the Rules" are to the Irish Takeover Panel Act, 1997, Takeover Rules, 2022.

data.title: Munich Re Could Raise Guidance If Hurricane Season Is Benign — Market Talk
Hemnet Group AB (publ) has received a request to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description:
Hemnet Group AB (publ) (the “Company”) announces that the Board of Directors today received a written request from Vor Capital LLP and Sprints Capital Management Ltd, which together represents 14.1% of the total shares and votes in the Company, to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting. The shareholders have requested that the meeting resolves on determination of the number of Board members and election of Board members.

Under the Swedish Companies Act (Sw. aktiebolagslagen) a request from shareholders representing at least 10 percent of all shares in the Company obliges the Board of Directors to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting no later than two weeks after receipt of such request. The Board of Directors will issue the notice convening the Extraordinary General Meeting within the prescribed timeframe in the Swedish Companies Act  (i.e. no later than 7 August 2026).

For more information, please contact:

Press enquiries

Staffan Tell, Head of PR

M: +46 733 67 66 85

E: staffan.tell@hemnet.se

IR enquiriesLudvig Segelmark, Head of IR

M: +46 702 50 14 40

E: ludvig.segelmark@hemnet.se

About Hemnet

Hemnet operates the leading property platform in Sweden. The company emerged as an industry initiative in 1998 and has since transformed into a "win-win" value proposition for the housing market. By offering a unique combination of relevant products, insights and inspiration, Hemnet has built lasting relationships with buyers, sellers, and agents for more than 25 years. Hemnet shares a mutual passion for homes with its stakeholders and is driven by being an independent go-to-place for people to turn to for the various housing needs that arise through life. This is mirrored in the Company’s vision to be the key to your property journey, supplying products and services to improve efficiency, transparency and mobility on the housing market. Hemnet is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm (‘HEM’).

Follow us: hemnetgroup.com / Facebook / LinkedIn / Instagram

This information is information that Hemnet Group AB (publ) is obliged to make public pursuant to the EU Market Abuse Regulation. The information was submitted for publication, through the agency of the contact persons set out above, at 2026-07-24 14:47 CEST.

Image Attachments

Fasadbild Sergelgatan Hemnet

Attachments

Hemnet Group AB (publ) has received a request to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting

CREDITACC: AUM up 16.4% YoY, PAT up 719.7% YoY, with strong asset quality and digital growth
data.description:
Q1 FY27 saw AUM rise 16.4% YoY to INR 30,319 Cr and PAT surge 719.7% YoY to INR 493 Cr, with improved asset quality and strong digital adoption. Retail finance share grew, collection efficiency remained high, and guidance targets robust growth and profitability.

Original document: CreditAccess Grameen Ltd. [CREDITACC] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

CREDITACC: Q1 FY27 net profit surged to ₹493.39 crore; Board approved NCD fund-raising up to ₹3,000 crore
data.description:
Revenue and net profit saw strong year-over-year growth in Q1 FY27, with net profit after tax rising to ₹493.39 crore and EPS at ₹30.79. The Board approved fund-raising via NCDs up to ₹3,000 crore, and key financial ratios remain robust.

Original document: CreditAccess Grameen Ltd. [CREDITACC] Interim report — Jul. 24 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: Varonis Systems Is Maintained at Overweight by Cantor Fitzgerald
SBILIFE: Strong Q1 FY27 growth with 22% profit rise and resilient margins despite group business impact
data.description:
Q1 FY27 saw robust growth with 14% higher individual rated premium and 22% profit growth year-over-year. Margins were impacted by a higher share of group business and GST drag, but are expected to normalize as product mix shifts toward individual and non-par products.

data.title: LBTYA: Q2 2026 delivered broadband growth, asset sales, and progress on the Ziggo spin-off, with guidance reaffirmed
data.description:
Q2 2026 saw strong broadband and mobile momentum, major asset monetizations, and progress on the Ziggo Group spin-off. Financials tracked guidance, with cost efficiencies and AI initiatives supporting margins amid competitive markets and ongoing network upgrades.

Original document: Liberty Global Ltd. [LBTYA] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

data.title: WDP: Merger forms a €13bn logistics REIT, delivering scale, synergies, and immediate value accretion
data.description:
A cross-border merger will create a €13bn logistics real estate leader, combining ARGAN’s French platform with WDP’s European reach. The deal offers a 21% premium for ARGAN shareholders, immediate EPS/NTA accretion, and €10m in cost synergies, with completion targeted for Q1 2027.

Original document: Warehouses De Pauw SA [WDP] Slides Release — Jul. 24 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.
